description: Relying on a single externally owned account (EOA) as contract admin creates a single point of failure. Key compromise, loss, or coercion can lead to irreversible upgrades, pauses, or fund drains with no recovery.
name: Single EOA Admin Without Rotation
remediation: - Use multisig (>=2-of-3) with hardware keys and timelocks for admin roles. - Document and test key rotation and recovery procedures. - Limit admin powers by role (upgrade vs. ops) and enforce separation of duties.
